Short CV

Dr. Muhammet Enis BULAK was born in 1986 in Istanbul. He completed his Ph.D. in the Department of Industrial Engineering at Istanbul University in 2018. He received the BSc in 2010 and MSc in 2012 from the Department of Industrial Engineering at Fatih University. He was a visiting professor at Qatar University in 2019. He has published significant papers in distinguished journals, and he is conducting a peer review in Industrial Engineering and Management related journals. His main research interests are given as follow:

• Green Supply Chain Management

• Sustainability

• Operations Management

• Quality Control and Statistical Approach

• Multi Criteria Decision Making

• Total Quality Management

• Quality Management and Innovation

• Statistical Modeling and Analysis

• Project Management

• Product Design and Usability

The top journals for his publishments can be listed as Sustainable Development, Journal of Cleaner Production, Sustainable Cities and Society and International Journal of Innovation and Technology Management and his Google Scholar profile is provided by following link:

https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=_u0YWYwAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate

He has worked as a consultant and Project manager for industrial companies from diversified sectors. He is also a Lead Auditor of ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System for establishing Quality Systems in manufacturing and service companies.

As an Industry and University collaboration emphasis, he has worked as an Instructor at Istanbul University Technopark Company in Incubation Center. His main duties can be listed as: Conducting Statistical Analysis with Structural Equation Modeling Techniques, preparing reports, Meeting with Customers, Helping out surveyors about designing questionnaires, Give trainings to the participants from firms and Making bridge between industry and university.

Dr. Muhammet Enis Bulak is currently working as a faculty member of the Industrial Engineering Program and Master of Engineering Management Program at Uskudar University and responsible for Distance Learning Commission.
